mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate signals easier financial conditions and a lower discount rate, which lifts equity multiples and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average when FEDFUNDS is falling, or if rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03 after sign inversion is optimized.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE identifies worsening labor market slack and weaker household income growth, which reduces near-term equity demand and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if threshold-crossing episodes are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if the effect disappears in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both accelerate together, nominal consumer spending is broadening across sales and payrolls, which signals stronger aggregate demand and should raise S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform either series alone in out-of-sample tests, or if positive 60-day returns fail to occur more often than not when both series trend higher.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in INDPRO after prior weakness indicates industrial output is recovering faster than expected, improving earnings expectations and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises for 2 consecutive monthly observations after a prior 3-month decline
failure_condition: Reject if rebound-triggered signals do not produce positive 5-day returns relative to baseline, or if the signal is neutralized once data revisions are incorporated.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation remains elevated while FEDFUNDS stays near the zero lower bound, real rates are highly negative and policy is effectively accommodative, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation is above its 12-month average and FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
failure_condition: Reject if the combined inflation-rate condition fails to predict positive 20-day returns more than 52% of the time, or if the sign weakens once FEDFUNDS rises above 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in PAYEMS and fall in UNRATE confirms broad labor-market strengthening, which should improve earnings expectations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined labor improvement does not outperform each component alone, or if 60-day returns are not positive in a majority of aligned episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST signals weakening residential investment and softer downstream demand for durable goods, which should translate into negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if below-average HOUST readings are followed by positive 20-day returns more often than negative ones, or if the signal has no incremental value after controlling for the prior trend.

mechanism_narrative: In a manufacturing downturn, weak INDPRO combined with rising UNRATE identifies a broad output gap and margin pressure, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint weakness pattern does not predict negative 5-day returns in triggered windows, or if the sign flips after accounting for market volatility.
